title: Apple Hunger Bar
description: Replaces hunger bar with apples, adds more detail to HUD elements and makes the crosshair smaller. Yummy!
body:
## For those who prefer juicy apples over the traditional hunger bar.
![New and Improved Icons!](https://i.imgur.com/B3JAcQn.png)
As you can see, I also added more detail to the existing UI elements like hearts, armor, bubbles and more!

## Feedback
As with all my other stuff, feel free to give me feedback on my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/u9SRbexPwk).
